# Bland Ewing’s Systems Ethology

This package was initiated in early 2000 and later transferred to GitHub
in 2014. It is based on Bland Ewing’s work dating back to the early
1970s. The goal is to make his simulation code available as an R package
and to provide a Shiny interface to the code. In 2026, I am using AI
([Google Gemini 3 Pro](https://gemini.google.com/)) via
[Antigravity](https://antigravity.google/) to improve the code and
interface.

Before installing the package, you may want to examine the interactive
Shiny app <https://connect.doit.wisc.edu/SystemsEthology>, which
executes this package. See also

- Writings
  - [BlandEwing](https://byandell.github.io/BlandEwing): draft life
    story
  - [SystemsEthology](https://byandell.github.io/SystemsEthology): draft
    book
  - [Systems Ethology–The Life and Work of Bland
    Ewing](https://byandell.github.io/pages/ewing/)
- Tools and Data
  - [Predator-Prey
    Datasets](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/inst/doc/datasets.md)
  - [Ewing Package
    Documentation](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/inst/doc/refactor)
  - [Articles](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/articles/)
    - [Developer
      Guide](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/articles/devel_guide/index.md)
    - [Tutorial
      Vignette](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/articles/ewing.md)
  - [Systems Ethology
    App](https://connect.doit.wisc.edu/SystemsEthology)

# Install and Run Package

Change one of the simulation values on the Shiny app, say number or
hosts or parasites, or number of simulation steps. Then click on **Start
Simulation** button to start a simulation. You can redo a simulation
with the same settings, or change the settings.

To install, first do

``` r

install.packages("pak")
```

If on Windows, you will then need to install Rtools from
<http://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools>. This is an executable
that will install some applications in c:. You will also need pdflatex,
which means you need a TeX distribution such as MikTeX or TeX Live.

``` r

pak::pak("byandell/ewing", dependencies = TRUE, upgrade = TRUE)
```

See
[vignettes/ewing.Rmd](https://github.com/byandell/ewing/blob/master/vignettes/ewing.Rmd)
for example use of code. A simple example is below:

``` r

library(ewing) # attach package
mysim <- init.simulation() # initialize simulation
simres <- future.events(mysim, plotit = FALSE) # simulate future events
plot(simres) # plot populations by stage or substrate over time
ggplot_current(simres, "host") # plot current (last) individuals over space
```

To change the number of initial individuals, do something like:

``` r

mysim <- init.simulation(count = c(200, 100))
```

will simulate 200 hosts and 100 parasites. You can also change the name
of simulation file results from “sim.out” to something like
“sim_200_100.out” to reflect the conditions of the simulation. Note that
this file is written into the directory where you are using R.

``` r

simres <- future.events(mysim, "mysim_200_100.out", plotit = FALSE)
```

Here are some commands to use `tidyverse` for newer plots:

``` r

library(tidyverse)
ggplot_ewing(simres)
ggplot_current(simres, "host")
```

For more information, visit <http://www.stat.wisc.edu/~yandell/ewing>

Reference: B Ewing, BS Yandell, JF Barbieri, and RF Luck (2002)
“Event-driven competing risks,” *Ecological Modelling 158*: 35–50.
<http://doi.org/10.1016/S0304-3800(02)00218-1>

# Package index

## All functions

- [`TemperatureBase`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/TemperatureBase.md)
  [`TemperaturePar`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/TemperatureBase.md)
  : temperature data tables for simulation
- [`autoplot(`*`<substrate>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/autoplot.substrate.md)
  : Plot Visual Substrate Network Layouts
- [`build_base_map()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/build_base_map.md)
  : Build Interactive Base Map
- [`create_substrate()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/create_substrate.md)
  : Create Substrate Geometric Object
- [`distPlotApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/distPlotApp.md)
  [`distPlotServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/distPlotApp.md)
  [`distPlotInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/distPlotApp.md)
  [`distPlotOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/distPlotApp.md)
  : Distribution Plot App
- [`downloadApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/downloadApp.md)
  [`downloadServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/downloadApp.md)
  [`downloadInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/downloadApp.md)
  : Download File App
- [`envPlotApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/envPlotApp.md)
  [`envPlotServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/envPlotApp.md)
  [`envPlotInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/envPlotApp.md)
  [`envPlotOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/envPlotApp.md)
  : Envelope Plot App
- [`event.future()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/event.future.md)
  : process immediate, pending and future events in quantitative
  population ethology simulation
- [`ewingApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewingApp.md)
  [`ewingServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewingApp.md)
  [`ewingInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewingApp.md)
  [`ewingOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewingApp.md)
  : Ewing App
- [`ewing_ageclass()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_ageclass.md)
  [`ggplot_ewing_ageclass()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_ageclass.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<ewing_ageclass>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_ageclass.md)
  : Ravel count from Ewing simulation models
- [`ewing_discrete()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_discrete.md)
  [`summary(`*`<ewing_discrete>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_discrete.md)
  [`make_ewing_discrete()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_discrete.md)
  : Envelope for Ewing simulations
- [`ewing_discrete1()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_discrete1.md)
  : Discrete time simulation for Ewing Envelope
- [`ewing_envelope()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_envelope.md)
  [`ewing_envelopes()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_envelope.md)
  [`summary(`*`<ewing_envelopes>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_envelope.md)
  [`print(`*`<ewing_envelopes>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_envelope.md)
  : Create Envelope of Ewing Simulations
- [`ewing_snapshot()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_snapshot.md)
  : Title
- [`ewing_substrate()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_substrate.md)
  [`ggplot_ewing_substrate()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_substrate.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<ewing_substrate>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ewing_substrate.md)
  : Ewing Substrate by Species
- [`future.events()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/future.events.md)
  : realize future events in quantitative population ethology simulation
- [`future.host`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/future.host.md)
  [`future.parasite`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/future.host.md)
  : future events table for species simulation
- [`future.meanvalue()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/future.meanvalue.md)
  : design mean value curves for future events in Ewing simulation
  models
- [`futureApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/futureApp.md)
  [`futureServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/futureApp.md)
  [`futureInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/futureApp.md)
  [`futureOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/futureApp.md)
  : Ewing Future Events App
- [`get_huc_from_point()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/get_huc_from_point.md)
  : Get HUC12 From Map Click Coordinate
- [`get_substrate_grid()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/get_substrate_grid.md)
  : Generate a Substrate Abstract Grid
- [`ggplot_ewing()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<ewing>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing.md)
  [`plot(`*`<ewing>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing.md)
  : ggplot of Ewing simulation model age classes
- [`ggplot_ewing_envelope()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing_envelope.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<ewing_envelope>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing_envelope.md)
  : GGplot of Ewing envelope
- [`ggplot_ewing_envelopes()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/ggplot_ewing_envelopes.md)
  : GGplot of Ewing multiple envelopes
- [`host.parasite`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/host.parasite.md)
  [`host.comperiella`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/host.parasite.md)
  [`host.encarsia`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/host.parasite.md)
  : host-parasite interaction table for simulation
- [`init.population()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/init.population.md)
  : Initialize Organism Population
- [`init.simulation()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/init.simulation.md)
  : Initialize simulation run
- [`initApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initApp.md)
  [`initServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initApp.md)
  [`initOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initApp.md)
  : Ewing Initialization App
- [`initParApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initParApp.md)
  [`initParServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initParApp.md)
  [`initParInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initParApp.md)
  [`initParUI()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initParApp.md)
  [`initParOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initParApp.md)
  : Ewing Initialization App
- [`initTemp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/initTemp.md)
  : temperature data tables for simulation
- [`leafletInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/leafletApp.md)
  [`leafletOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/leafletApp.md)
  [`leafletServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/leafletApp.md)
  [`leafletApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/leafletApp.md)
  : Interactive Leaflet Mapping UI (Input)
- [`multApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/multApp.md)
  [`multServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/multApp.md)
  [`multInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/multApp.md)
  [`multOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/multApp.md)
  : Multiple Simulation Envelope App
- [`organism.features`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/organism.features.md)
  : organism features master table
- [`origEwingApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/origEwingApp.md)
  [`origEwingServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/origEwingApp.md)
  [`origEwingInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/origEwingApp.md)
  [`origEwingOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/origEwingApp.md)
  : Ewing App
- [`redscale`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/redscale.md) :
  Red Scale simulation initiation
- [`simApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simApp.md)
  [`simServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simApp.md)
  [`simInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simApp.md)
  [`simUI()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simApp.md) :
  Ewing Simulation Engine App
- [`simdata`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simdata.md) :
  Simulated Data with Multiple Runs
- [`simpleInput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simpleServer.md)
  [`simpleOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simpleServer.md)
  [`simpleApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/simpleServer.md)
  : simple Input
- [`substrate.host`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrate.host.md)
  [`substrate.parasite`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrate.host.md)
  [`substrate.substrate`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrate.host.md)
  : substrate data for host-parasite movement
- [`substrateApp()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrateApp.md)
  [`substrateServer()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrateApp.md)
  [`substrateOutput()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrateApp.md)
  : Substrate Plot App
- [`substrate_topology()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/substrate_topology.md)
  : Define Tridiagonal Substrate Topology
- [`summary(`*`<ewing>`*`)`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/summary.ewing.md)
  : summary of Ewing simulation models
- [`temp.design()`](https://byandell.github.io/ewing/reference/temp.design.md)
  : graphical adjustment of daily high and low temperature
